description: Dark-denim cross-body phone pouch featuring diagonal patchwork of orange running-stitch (sashiko) embroidery, with a slim adjustable strap.
Deep-indigo denim phone pouch repurposing a jeans back-pocket, trimmed with tonal stitching and hung on a chunky braided strap.
Indigo-denim cross-body phone pouch with vertical panels of pink floral sashiko stitching on the front, plus a simple matching strap.
Black-denim phone pouch with cascading raindrop-style sashiko embroidery on one side, with a narrow black strap.
Dark denim cross-body phone pouch adorned with golden flower sashiko embroidery scattered across the front, on a matching narrow strap.
Denim cross-body phone pouch with a diagonal triangular inset of orange-and-white printed cotton fabric featuring circle motifs, topped with a slim orange trim.
Silver faux-snakeskin phone pouch with a matching narrow silver strap and top-stitched detailing.
Navy denim phone pouch featuring vertical bands of orange sashiko running-stitching and finished with navy rickrack trim along the sides and on the strap.
Deep denim cross-body phone pouch with a vertical strip of patchwork featuring sequential printed circle motifs in green and yellow tones, on an adjustable denim strap.
Dark denim cross-body phone pouch with white and lavender sashiko embroidery forming a graduated fringe of vertical stitches and arrow-loop accents cascading from the top edge.
Deep indigo denim phone pouch featuring three narrow horizontal bands of pink-and-yellow diamond-patterned woven cotton across the bottom.
Braided denim strap phone pouch with a front woven patchwork of small indigo denim squares, finished with a slim orange top trim.
Dark denim phone pouch decorated with white chain-stitch embroidery: parallel horizontal bands near the top and a meandering curving line at the lower right.
Black canvas cross-body phone pouch with white sashiko running stitches and tiny floral motifs cascading diagonally across the front.
Dark indigo denim phone pouch with a chunky braided strap, featuring diagonal rows of white running stitches and scattered cobalt-blue satin-teardrop stitches along one corner.
